# Fanout

> Multi-tenant social media distribution API. Post to 9 platforms with one API call. Built for agencies and SaaS engines.

## What Fanout Does

Fanout is a social media distribution platform that lets agencies and SaaS builders post content to multiple social platforms (X/Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, YouTube, Reddit, Threads) on behalf of their clients via a single REST API.

## Key Features

- **Multi-tenant**: Each client gets isolated OAuth tokens, analytics, and API keys via Clerk orgs
- **9 Platforms**: X/Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, YouTube, Reddit, Threads
- **Scheduled posting**: Queue posts in advance, Inngest handles retries and failures
- **AI generation**: Claude generates platform-optimized copy variants from one prompt
- **Analytics**: Per-platform engagement metrics (impressions, likes, comments, shares, clicks)
- **Webhooks**: Per-profile callback URLs for post status events
- **Token encryption**: OAuth tokens encrypted at rest via Supabase pgcrypto

## API

Base URL: https://fanout.digital

Authentication: Bearer token (API key from dashboard)

### Endpoints

- POST /api/v1/post — Post immediately to one or more platforms
- POST /api/v1/schedule — Schedule a post for a future time
- GET /api/v1/platforms — List connected platforms for a profile
- DELETE /api/v1/platforms/{platform} — Disconnect a platform
- GET /api/v1/analytics/{postId} — Get engagement analytics for a post

## Pricing

- Starter: $49/mo — 3 profiles, 5 platforms
- Agency: $199/mo — 25 profiles, all 9 platforms, AI generation, analytics
- White-Label: $399/mo — unlimited profiles, custom domain, white-label dashboard

- Homepage: https://fanout.digital
